news.t: Seeking 9%-Plus Passive Income? Top Investor Says Buy This Dividend ETF

Infrastructure Capital Announces a Quarterly Dividend Increase for: Infrastructure Capital Small Cap Income ETF (SCAP), Infrastructure Capital Equity Income ETF (ICAP), and Infrastructure Capital Bond Income ETF (BNDS)
Infrastructure Capital Announces a Quarterly Dividend Increase for The Infrastructure Capital Small Cap Income ETF (SCAP) and Infrastructure Capital Equity Income ETF (ICAP)
Infrastructure Capital Advisors Announces a Quarterly Dividend Increase for the Infracap Small Cap Income ETF (SCAP) and the Infracap Equity Income Fund ETF (ICAP)

holdings.infoBox: ICAP is an equity ETF with a total of 199 individual holdings. The top holdings are Toll Brothers stock at 5.42%, Citizens Financial Group at 4.54%, Lockheed Martin at 4.41%, Broadcom at 4.36%, and Lennar at 4.14%.

overview.description: The Infrastructure Capital Equity Income ETF (ICAP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to global stocks that pay dividends during normal market conditions. The fund seeks to maximize income and pursue total return. ICAP was launched on Dec 29, 2021 and is issued by InfraCap.

data.text: High income and long-term growth don’t often go hand in hand. Yet, that’s exactly what InfraCap Equity Income Fund ETF ($ICAP) is aiming to deliver. While the fund manages just…

data.title: Dividend Stocks are Paying Off for Income Investors
data.text: When the stock market hits a rough patch, it can pay to hide out in dividend stocks. Those cash payouts to shareholders are akin to a vaccine or an underground war bunker.
